title: festuca brevipila var. multinervis
intro: Festuca brevipila var. multinervis is a type of grass species belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of China. The medicinal properties of Festuca brevipila var. multinervis have been utilized in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, particularly respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to soothe and clear the respiratory tract, promoting easier breathing and relief from congestion. Herbal preparations of Festuca brevipila var. multinervis typically involve drying and grinding the plant material into a powder, which can be used in teas, decoctions, or combined with other herbs for medicinal purposes.
